risk_rationale: The Social Media Child Protection Act introduces a significant compliance gap by prohibiting individuals under 16 from accessing social media platforms, which conflicts with TikTok's current policy allowing users aged 13 and above. The requirement for age verification through valid identification also presents a material compliance gap, as TikTok currently uses machine learning and safety reviews for age assurance. These gaps could lead to substantial legal and operational challenges if not addressed promptly.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Minimum age: TikTok states service is for age 13+ (or higher where local law requires)
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Prohibits individuals under 16 from accessing social media platforms
compliance_gaps.gap_description: TikTok allows users aged 13 and above, conflicting with the new regulation prohibiting access for those under 16.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Detection and prevention: TikTok uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Mandates age verification through valid identification
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Current age assurance methods do not meet the new requirement for age verification through valid identification.

remediations.title: Adjust Minimum Age Policy
remediations.description: Update the minimum age policy to comply with the new regulation by prohibiting access to users under 16.
acceptance_criteria: Existing accounts under 16 are flagged for review

remediations.title: Implement Valid ID Age Verification
remediations.description: Develop and integrate a system for age verification using valid identification to comply with the new regulatory requirement.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification system accepts valid IDs

business_impact: The new regulation could significantly reduce the user base by restricting access to individuals under 16, impacting user growth and engagement metrics. Implementing valid ID verification may also increase operational costs and affect user onboarding experience.
recommended_actions: Initiate legal review to assess the potential impact and timeline for compliance.
Prioritize development of age verification system using valid IDs.
Communicate upcoming changes to users and stakeholders to manage expectations.
